title: Feat implementation continuation — defense, skill, and contextual combat options
source: packs/feats.db refreshed descriptions and prior phase reports
changedFeats: Grand Army of the Republic Training
engineChanges: DefenseCalculator now supports feat metadata that chooses the better ability modifier for a defense.
DefenseCalculator now supports Grand Army of the Republic Training armor-Fortitude-to-Will metadata.
CombatOptionResolver now supports context-number attack formulas such as Swarm adjacent ally count.
CombatOptionResolver now carries targetEffectsOnHit metadata into attack roll result context.
Attack rolls now attach targetEffectsOnHit to chat flags/context for future target-application buttons.
CombatOptionResolver now fails closed for unselected flag controls so metadata-only flags do not silently apply.
CombatOptionResolver now supports damageModifierFormula values sourced from attack context, used by Bowcaster Marksman and Heavy Hitter metadata.
runtimeNotes: Predictive Defense, Force of Personality, Grand Army of the Republic Training, Trustworthy, Conditioned, Surgical Precision, and roll-context attack options have concrete engine consumers.

Reaction/action economy/conditional defense records are explicit metadata and diagnostics-ready; some still need dedicated UI buttons or target-application prompts before they can fully automate in play.
Old migrated numeric scaffold modifiers were disabled for all touched feats to avoid false attack/skill/static-defense bonuses.
Additional false +2 attack scaffolds were converted for movement, defense, mounted/vehicle, appendage, and target-rider feats; several are explicit metadata pending UI/target-application wiring.
